segments.text: I start watching I start learning and I
keep consuming information consuming
that information makes me feel really
good because I feel like I'm doing
something when in actuality I'm really
not we are in the Age of Excess info
right now be it college courses be it
the internet be it social media be it
tutorials all of these things right
which is why we spend 50 plus hours
watching like 100 videos in order to
learn a skill or try to plan and
strategize the problem with that is not
a lot of people know when to stop it
treat learning any skill as playing
wolin in public you start playing it and
you learn as you go for example pick a
project build that project and learn the
skills required to complete that project
on the go
